# services.tuned

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.tuned`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.tuned.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable TuneD. |
| `services.tuned.package` | `package` | The tuned package to use. |
| `services.tuned.ppdSettings` | `open submodule of attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | Settings for TuneD's power-profiles-daemon compatibility service. |
| `services.tuned.ppdSettings.battery` | `attribute set of string` | Map of PPD battery states to TuneD profiles. |
| `services.tuned.ppdSettings.main` | `submodule` | Core configuration for power-profiles-daemon support. |
| `services.tuned.ppdSettings.main.battery_detection` | `boolean` | Whether to enable battery detection. |
| `services.tuned.ppdSettings.main.default` | `string` | Default PPD profile. |
| `services.tuned.ppdSettings.profiles` | `attribute set of string` | Map of PPD profiles to native TuneD profiles. |
| `services.tuned.ppdSupport` | `boolean` | Whether to enable translation of power-profiles-daemon API calls to TuneD. |
| `services.tuned.profiles` | `attribute set of (open submodule of attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string)))` | Profiles for TuneD. See {manpage}`tuned.conf(5)` for details. |
| `services.tuned.recommend` | `attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | TuneD rules for `recommend_profile`, written to `/etc/tuned/recommend.conf`. At startup, the daemon evaluates the file in alphabetical order. The first matching entry is applied. Empty profile rules always match. If `services.tuned.ppdSupport` is `true`, settings in `services.tuned.ppdSettings` take precedence over both the default behaviour and `services.tuned.recommend`. For example: `services.tuned.ppdSettings.main.default = "performance";` ensures the corresponding PPD profile is applied regardless of `services.tuned.recommend` setting. If `ppdSupport` is `false`, only `services.tuned.recommend` is used; if `recommend` is empty, TuneD's default behaviour applies. See {manpage}`tuned-main.conf(5)` for more details. |
| `services.tuned.settings` | `open submodule of (submodule)` | Configuration for TuneD. See {manpage}`tuned-main.conf(5)` for details. |
| `services.tuned.settings.daemon` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the use of a daemon for TuneD. |
| `services.tuned.settings.default_instance_priority` | `signed integer` | Default instance (unit) priority. |
| `services.tuned.settings.dynamic_tuning` | `boolean` | Whether to enable dynamic tuning. |
| `services.tuned.settings.globalSection` | `section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | global section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string)) |
| `services.tuned.settings.profile_dirs` | `string` | Directories to search for profiles, separated by `,` or `;`. |
| `services.tuned.settings.reapply_sysctl` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the reapplying of global sysctls after TuneD sysctls are applied. |
| `services.tuned.settings.recommend_command` | `boolean` | Whether to enable recommend functionality. |
| `services.tuned.settings.sections` | `attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string)) |
| `services.tuned.settings.sleep_interval` | `signed integer` | Interval in which the TuneD daemon is waken up and checks for events (in seconds). |
| `services.tuned.settings.update_interval` | `signed integer` | Update interval for dynamic tuning (in seconds). |
